intent: Convert exact approval packets into the post-execution checks that must pass after any future approved archive move.
source_rule: This report is a verification contract only. It does not record approval, move files, create _archive, sync runtimes, or deploy.
required_next_gate: Keep source larger than runtime until each source-only or duplicate family is classified.
Use an exact approval phrase before executing any plan.
After approval, verify source absence, archive presence, file count, hashes, live receipt, and rollback contract for only the approved plan.
Rerun mapper after execution and before any runtime, Android, or deploy lane.
